/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cAp_mp3Decoder.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libcAp_mp3Decoder.so.2 -o libcAp_mp3Decoder.so.2.3.0 CMakeFiles/cAp_mp3Decoder.dir/src/cMP3Decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAp_mp3Decoder.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cAp_mp3Decoder.dir/mpaudec/bits.c.o CMakeFiles/cAp_mp3Decoder.dir/mpaudec/mpaudec.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/anstrofon/Стільниця/c++/test/build/cAudio/cAudio: ../../cAudio/libcAudio.so ../../DependenciesSource/libvorbis-1.3.2/libVorbis.a ../../DependenciesSource/libogg-1.2.2/libOgg.a /usr/lib/libopenal.so
